'''zovawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xanthotic|xanthotic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-v-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xanthotic|xanthotic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zovawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zovawithi|zovawithi]] || [[word:zovawiji|zovawiji]] || [[word:zovawishi|zovawishi]] || [[word:zovawiki|zovawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zovawuthuthu|zovawuthuthu]] || [[word:zovawujuju|zovawujuju]] || [[word:zovawushushu|zovawushushu]] || [[word:zovawukuku|zovawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zovawuthu|zovawuthu]] || [[word:zovawuju|zovawuju]] || [[word:zovawushu|zovawushu]] || [[word:zovawuku|zovawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zovawufthuf|zovawufthuf]] || [[word:zovawufjuf|zovawufjuf]] || [[word:zovawufshuf|zovawufshuf]] || [[word:zovawufkuf|zovawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zovawethe|zovawethe]] || [[word:zovaweje|zovaweje]] || [[word:zovaweshe|zovaweshe]] || [[word:zovaweke|zovaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zovawothotho|zovawothotho]] || [[word:zovawojojo|zovawojojo]] || [[word:zovawoshosho|zovawoshosho]] || [[word:zovawokoko|zovawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zovawotho|zovawotho]] || [[word:zovawojo|zovawojo]] || [[word:zovawosho|zovawosho]] || [[word:zovawoko|zovawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zovawofthof|zovawofthof]] || [[word:zovawofjof|zovawofjof]] || [[word:zovawofshof|zovawofshof]] || [[word:zovawofkof|zovawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zovawÃŸfthÃŸf|zovawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zovawÃŸfjÃŸf|zovawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zovawÃŸfshÃŸf|zovawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zovawÃŸfkÃŸf|zovawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zovawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|zovawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zovawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|zovawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zovawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|zovawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zovawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|zovawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zovawÃŸfthÃŸf|zovawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zovawÃŸfjÃŸf|zovawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zovawÃŸfshÃŸf|zovawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zovawÃŸfkÃŸf|zovawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zovawÃŸfthÃŸf|zovawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zovawÃŸfjÃŸf|zovawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zovawÃŸfshÃŸf|zovawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zovawÃŸfkÃŸf|zovawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zovawÃḊthÃḊ|zovawÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:zovawÃḊjÃḊ|zovawÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:zovawÃḊshÃḊ|zovawÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:zovawÃḊkÃḊ|zovawÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zovawathatha|zovawathatha]] || [[word:zovawajaja|zovawajaja]] || [[word:zovawashasha|zovawashasha]] || [[word:zovawakaka|zovawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zovawatha|zovawatha]] || [[word:zovawaja|zovawaja]] || [[word:zovawasha|zovawasha]] || [[word:zovawaka|zovawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zovawafthaf|zovawafthaf]] || [[word:zovawafjaf|zovawafjaf]] || [[word:zovawafshaf|zovawafshaf]] || [[word:zovawafkaf|zovawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zovawasha|zovawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zovawshÃḋasha|zovawshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zovawroasha|zovawroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zovawmuasha|zovawmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zovawyaasha|zovawyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozovawnkshÃḋasha|gozovawnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozovawnkroasha|gozovawnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozovawnkmuasha|gozovawnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozovawnkyaasha|gozovawnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zovavawasha|zovavawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zovavawshÃḋasha|zovavawshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zovavawroasha|zovavawroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zovavawmuasha|zovavawmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zovavawyaasha|zovavawyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozovavawnkshÃḋasha|gozovavawnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozovavawnkroasha|gozovavawnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozovavawnkmuasha|gozovavawnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozovavawnkyaasha|gozovavawnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zevÃḊwasha|zevÃḊwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zevÃḊwshÃḋasha|zevÃḊwshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zevÃḊwroasha|zevÃḊwroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zevÃḊwmuasha|zevÃḊwmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zevÃḊwyaasha|zevÃḊwyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozevÃḊwnkshÃḋasha|gozevÃḊwnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozevÃḊwnkroasha|gozevÃḊwnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozevÃḊwnkmuasha|gozevÃḊwnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozevÃḊwnkyaasha|gozevÃḊwnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zovfawasha|zovfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zovfawshÃḋasha|zovfawshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zovfawroasha|zovfawroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zovfawmuasha|zovfawmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zovfawyaasha|zovfawyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozovfawnkshÃḋasha|gozovfawnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozovfawnkroasha|gozovfawnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozovfawnkmuasha|gozovfawnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozovfawnkyaasha|gozovfawnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
